concerns.text: FR-008 requires matching using 'project size (LOC)' as a covariate. The plan's '01_curation.py' (FR-001) extracts repo-level metadata (stars, age) but does not explicitly define the extraction of 'project size (LOC)' (total lines of code in the repo) as a distinct data entity or field in the data model. The data-model.md defines 'Repository' but lacks a 'total_loc' field, and 'CodeBlock' has 'loc' (block-level). Without a defined plan element to extract and store repo-level LOC, FR-008 cannot be satisfied.
